data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Read existing test patterns from tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh and tests/lib/assert.sh. Pattern: source assert.sh, use _snapshot_fail + assert_eq + assert_pass_if_clean per test, call print_summary at end. Confirmed old skill directories exist: project-setup, dev-onboarding, design-onboarding — each has SKILL.md but none contain redirect content yet (they have full original content). Tests will be RED.
